world_definitions.description: Cooperation offers survival upside, but reciprocity can flip into betrayal.
Previously safe routines fail after mid-episode rule changes.
High-salience resource cues hide trap-heavy downside risk.
Perception is low-bandwidth and the agent must avoid overconfident guesses.
Action consequences arrive late, so the agent must preserve cautious continuity.
Holdout world mixing social ambiguity with low-confidence perception.
Holdout world with delayed acknowledgments, missing adapters, and drifting rules.
